libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native-image runtime tests on JDK 25, set native test runtime system properties: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Keep coverage self-contained by creating a local Vert.x HttpServer in tests rather than relying on external services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative; the native-image failure may also require metadata changes beyond the Netty runtime flags.
Optional Vert.x integrations such as OAuth2 or Jackson databind exist, but they are not required for meaningful WebClient coverage unless tests deliberately exercise those optional paths.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client can be meaningfully tested with an in-process Vert.x HTTP server and its normal transitive dependencies, but Vert.x 5.0.1 still resolves Netty 4.2.x and needs the same Java 25 native-run system properties already used for 5.0.0.
